Name: FBlueprintComponentDelegateBinding
Description: Entry for a delegate to assign after a blueprint has been instanced

Variables.Name: ComponentPropertyName
Variables.Description: Name of component property that contains delegate we want to assign to.

Variables.Name: DelegatePropertyName
Variables.Description: Name of property on the component that we want to assign to.

Variables.Name: FunctionNameToBind
Variables.Description: Name of function that we want to bind to the delegate.
